title: RUNNER_STATE
description: Runner state machine. Persisted after every step to enable recovery on crash or interruption. Must be machine-readable.

runner_id.description: Matches the runner contract that started this instance.

current_step.description: Current step number. Incremented after each completed step.

current_round.description: Current review round. Incremented after each GPT review submission.

terminal.description: Is this bounded runner chain in a terminal state? If false, the runner MUST continue its declared next action.

last_decision.description: Most recent business decision from GPT or gate.

next_action.description: Next action to execute. REQUIRED when terminal=false.

next_task_spec_path.description: Path to the next TaskSpec to consume. REQUIRED when last_decision=accepted and allow_next_stage=true.

last_outcome_path.description: Path to the most recent FLOW_OUTCOME.json.

last_dispatch_result_path.description: Path to the most recent DISPATCH_RESULT.json.

heartbeat.description: ISO8601 timestamp of last state write. Used to detect stalled runners.

resume_command.description: Command to resume execution. REQUIRED when terminal=true and business_decision is human_required or when stopped with a known resume path.
